gaps: No test case validates that the Welcome/Splash screen respects the selected app language (Spanish). All existing tests focus on dark/light theme rendering, EULA content, and permission flows — none cover language localization on the welcome screen.

Missing lifecycle dimension: The bug requires closing and reopening the app to observe the welcome screen language issue. No existing test validates welcome screen text after app kill/relaunch with a non-default language setting.

Missing state trigger: The bug involves the welcome screen reading from a language preference that may not be correctly applied during app initialization. No test validates the sequence: change language → kill app → relaunch → verify welcome screen text.
Missing device asymmetry consideration: The bug specifically targets Spanish language. No test validates Spanish (or any non-English) localization of the welcome screen text.

Missing app lifecycle coverage: No existing test covers the scenario where app language is changed in Account/Settings and then the app is fully restarted to verify the welcome screen reflects the change.

generated_testcases.title: TC-LOC-001: Verify Welcome Screen Displays Spanish After Language Change and App Restart
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Device Name] → Account/Settings → App Language
Change App Language from 'English (Default)' to 'Español (Spanish)'
Tap 'Apply' or 'Confirm' to save the language change
Fully kill the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe from Recent Apps or force stop via Android Settings → Apps → Poly Studio Mobile → Force Stop)
Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app
Observe the Welcome/Splash screen text displayed during app initialization
generated_testcases.expected: The Welcome/Splash screen displays all text in Spanish (e.g., 'Bienvenido a Poly Studio Mobile', 'Conectar dispositivo', 'Configurar'). The language matches the selected 'Español' preference and does not display Portuguese or English text.

generated_testcases.title: TC-LOC-002: Verify Welcome Screen Displays Spanish After Language Change, App Restart, and Bluetooth Reconnection
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Device Name] → Account/Settings → App Language
Change App Language to 'Español (Spanish)' and confirm
Fully kill the Poly Studio Mobile app
Turn off Bluetooth on the phone
Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app and observe the Welcome/Splash screen text
Turn on Bluetooth and wait for auto-reconnection to the Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC
Observe the Welcome/Splash screen text again during the reconnection flow
generated_testcases.expected: The Welcome/Splash screen displays all text in Spanish both on initial launch (Bluetooth off) and during the reconnection flow. No Portuguese or incorrect language text appears. The language preference persists correctly through the Bluetooth state transition.

generated_testcases.title: TC-LOC-003: Verify Welcome Screen Displays Spanish After Language Change, App Kill, and Phone Reboot
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Device Name] → Account/Settings → App Language
Change App Language to 'Español (Spanish)' and confirm
Fully kill the Poly Studio Mobile app
Reboot the Android phone
After phone reboot, open Poly Studio Mobile app
Observe the Welcome/Splash screen text during app initialization
generated_testcases.expected: The Welcome/Splash screen displays all text in Spanish after a full phone reboot. The language preference is persisted in app storage and correctly read during app initialization. No Portuguese or English text is shown.

generated_testcases.title: TC-LOC-004: Verify Welcome Screen Displays Portuguese When Language Is Set to Portuguese (Control Test)
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Device Name] → Account/Settings → App Language
Change App Language to 'Português (Portuguese)' and confirm
Fully kill the Poly Studio Mobile app
Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app
Observe the Welcome/Splash screen text during app initialization
generated_testcases.expected: The Welcome/Splash screen displays all text in Portuguese (e.g., 'Bem-vindo ao Poly Studio Mobile'). This confirms that Portuguese localization works correctly and serves as a control to differentiate from the Spanish bug scenario.

generated_testcases.title: TC-LOC-005: Verify Welcome Screen Displays Correct Language After Switching from Spanish to English and Restarting
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Device Name] → Account/Settings → App Language
Change App Language to 'Español (Spanish)' and confirm
Fully kill and reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app to confirm Spanish displays correctly on Welcome screen
Navigate to Account/Settings → App Language again
Change App Language back to 'English (Default)' and confirm
Fully kill the Poly Studio Mobile app
Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app
Observe the Welcome/Splash screen text during app initialization
generated_testcases.expected: The Welcome/Splash screen displays all text in English after switching back from Spanish. The language toggle works bidirectionally and the Welcome screen correctly reflects the current language preference after app restart.

generated_testcases.title: TC-LOC-006: Verify Welcome Screen Displays Spanish After Language Change Without App Restart (Negative Case)
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Device Name] → Account/Settings → App Language
Change App Language to 'Español (Spanish)' and confirm
Do NOT kill the app. Press the Home button to background the app
Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app from the Recent Apps list (app resumes from background)
Observe the Welcome/Splash screen text
generated_testcases.expected: The Welcome/Splash screen may NOT appear (since the app was not killed) OR if it does appear, it should display in Spanish. This documents the expected behavior difference between backgrounding vs. full app restart.

generated_testcases.title: TC-LOC-007: Verify Welcome Screen Displays Spanish After Language Change via System Settings (Android Locale Override)
steps: Open Android System Settings → System → Languages & Input → Languages
Add 'Español (España)' or 'Español (Estados Unidos)' as the system language and move it to the top
Open Poly Studio Mobile app (ensure app language is set to 'Follow System' or default)
If Welcome screen appears, observe the language
Fully kill and reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app
Observe the Welcome/Splash screen text during app initialization
generated_testcases.expected: If the app respects system locale, the Welcome screen displays in Spanish. If the app has its own language override, the system locale may not affect it. This test documents the interaction between system-level and app-level language settings for the Welcome screen.
